name: IRC_AF_SECTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.SECTION_ID SECTION_ID, B.AF_VERSION_ID AF_VERSION_ID, B.SECTION_SEQ_NUM SECTION_SEQ_NUM, TL.SECTION_NAME SECTION_NAME, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_AF_SECTIONS_B B, IRC_AF_SECTIONS_TL TL WHERE B.SECTION_ID = TL.SECTION_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
